en.extract:
The yellow-spectacled heleia (Heleia wallacei), also known as the yellow-ringed white-eye is a species of bird in the white-eye family of Zosteropidae. It is found in the Lesser Sunda Islands.
Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest.

The '''yellow-spectacled heleia''' ('''''Heleia wallacei'''''), also known as the '''yellow-ringed white-eye'''<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/new/ioc-lists/master-list-2/ |title=Master Lists: v15.1 |website=[[IOC World Bird List]] |publisher=[[International Ornithologists' Union]] |access-date=13 March 2025}}</ref> is a species of [[bird]] in the white-eye family of [[Zosteropidae]]. It is found in the [[Lesser Sunda Islands]].

Its natural [[habitat]] is [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]].
